title: Meditation Guidee Detaillee
justification: This French guided meditation provides the most complete and systematic coverage of mindfulness of breathing as taught in the Mahasi tradition. It offers a coherent structure from posture establishment through breath observation to full vipassana practice, with clear progression and practical instructions. The text includes rich pedagogical elements (puppy training analogy, bird watcher metaphor) and culminates in the three characteristics and metta practice, making it ideal as a chapter spine.
summary: A comprehensive 67-minute guided meditation in French covering the complete Mahasi Sayadaw vipassana technique, from establishing posture and breath awareness through noting practice to insight into the three characteristics. The text systematically builds from calming techniques to open awareness, addressing common obstacles and concluding with loving-kindness meditation.

relevance.note: Detailed breathing meditation instructions with abdominal awareness
